# `nise tool-alias`

- **Usage**: `nise tool-alias [-p --tool <TOOL>] [--no-header] <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/tool_alias/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/tool_alias/mod.rs)

Manage tool version aliases.

## Flags

### `-p --tool <TOOL>`

Filter aliases by tool

### `--no-header`

Don't show table header

## Subcommands

- [`nise tool-alias get <TOOL> <ALIAS>`](/cli/tool-alias/get.md)
- [`nise tool-alias ls [--no-header] [TOOL]`](/cli/tool-alias/ls.md)
- [`nise tool-alias set <ARGS>…`](/cli/tool-alias/set.md)
- [`nise tool-alias unset <TOOL> [ALIAS]`](/cli/tool-alias/unset.md)
